description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing male figure with curly hair and a beard, draped in a classical garment that covers his lower body and is slung over one shoulder. The figure's muscular torso is exposed, and his right arm is bent at the elbow, while his left arm rests at his side. The garment is rendered with detailed folds, and the figure stands with one leg slightly forward, giving a sense of movement. The surface has a dark, metallic appearance, suggesting it is cast in bronze or a similar metal. The overall style is reminiscent of Greco-Roman statuary, with realistic anatomical features and a dignified posture. The back of the sculpture shows the garment draped across the shoulders and down the back, with the hair and beard intricately modeled.
description: A dark metallic sculpture of a bearded, curly-haired male figure draped in a classical garment, standing with one leg forward and detailed anatomical features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the exposed muscular torso, detailed facial features, and the draped garment over one shoulder.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the garment folds and the figure's forward-leaning posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the draped garment across the back and the intricate hair and beard details.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view emphasizing the figure's arm position and the garment's flow along the side.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture is isolated on a plain background.
